name: Bill Christie
subject: don't forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
If you don't know by now, I'm Chris' dad Bill. This has been an extremely thrilling time for our family, and to say I'm a proud father is an understatement.

Today, I'm asking you to help me out. This Sunday is Chris' birthday and I want to make sure he knows how much we all support him. **[Don't forget to add your name and a personal note to his birthday card by tomorrow afternoon and Mary Pat and I will personally make sure he gets it](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43750811:19089465917:m:1:1516426255:EDD5F97B3E276B922B3F710BCE384B36:r)**.
Thank you and I hope you all have a wonderful Labor Day Weekend.

Bill Christie
****

****
****
****

---
| |
---|---|---
| | Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc.
---

P.O. Box 9119
Morristown, NJ 07963
(973) 936-9318

**You can unsubscribe instantly[here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJdTb5qp4N)**.

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: It just gets worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Just watching President Obama cozy up with pro-abortion extremists makes me sick to my stomach.

Despite protests erupting across America as videos emerge revealing Planned Parenthood aborting unborn babies and selling off their body parts for profit.

...Obama just thumbed his nose at the American people.

As if ruining healthcare for millions of Americans wasn't already bad enough, _Obama is sending Planned Parenthood another million dollars in taxpayer money to advertise ObamaCare on behalf of the federal government_!

He's funding his political allies while laughing in our face, Fellow Conservative.

**[That's why I'm asking you to hold the line against President Obama and keep up the pressure on your elected officials by signing your Defund Planned Parenthood petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30192649:28953439553:m:1:879035888:81C798A1819110BB6F1989086DB36358:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, it's unacceptable that over half a BILLION dollars is ripped from the paychecks of hard-working taxpayers and sent directly to Planned Parenthood's abortion mills across the country.

But what's even more unacceptable is that some of my colleagues think we should surrender -- that we should just tuck tail and run from this fight.

They couldn't be more wrong.

You and I both know that President Obama won't back down from this fight.

And neither should we!

I refuse to bow down to Obama's commands and stand by while the federal government funds an organization that dismembers and sells the organs of innocent, unborn babies.

But if you and I don't take a stand right now, no one else will.

I'm sure you remember how, despite members of BOTH parties opposing me, my bill to defund Planned Parenthood came up just a few votes short.

_Fellow Conservative, don't be discouraged. This fight is just getting warmed up_!

Hundreds of rallies across the country have erupted as thousands and thousands of Americans rise up in protest.

We've built up an enormous amount of momentum over the past few weeks.

Now I'm asking for your help to turn this energy into a grassroots force to be reckoned with and draw a line in the sand demanding your elected officials defund Planned Parenthood.

**[Can I count on you to join this fight by signing your petition right now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30192649:28953439553:m:1:879035888:81C798A1819110BB6F1989086DB36358:r)**?

After you sign your petition, please **[watch my campaign's new Stand for Life video and chip in your most generous contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30192649:28953439553:m:1:879035888:81C798A1819110BB6F1989086DB36358:r)** to help me mobilize the grassroots pressure it's going to take to strip Planned Parenthood of every last penny of taxpayer dollars.

Congress controls the power of the purse, Fellow Conservative.

If President Obama wants to ignore the pleas of the American people and veto this legislation, then so be it! _Let him, Hillary Clinton, and the rest of the Democrats explain why their pro-abortion extremism should be subsidized by the taxpayers_.

If I'm elected President, I will fight tirelessly to end abortion on demand, just as I'm fighting to defund Planned Parenthood now.

But it's going to take a massive outpouring of pressure. **[So I'm counting on your immediate action](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30192649:28953439553:m:1:879035888:81C798A1819110BB6F1989086DB36358:r)**.

Thank you in advance for your continued support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30192650:28953439553:m:1:879035888:81C798A1819110BB6F1989086DB36358:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30192651:28953439553:m:1:879035888:81C798A1819110BB6F1989086DB36358:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30192652:28953439553:m:1:879035888:81C798A1819110BB6F1989086DB36358:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30192653:28953439553:m:1:879035888:81C798A1819110BB6F1989086DB36358:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30192649:28953439553:m:1:879035888:81C798A1819110BB6F1989086DB36358:r)

\-- Rand

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30192654:28953439553:m:1:879035888:81C798A1819110BB6F1989086DB36358:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30192655:28953439553:m:1:879035888:81C798A1819110BB6F1989086DB36358:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30192656:28953439553:m:1:879035888:81C798A1819110BB6F1989086DB36358:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Josh Wolf
subject: picked apart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Donald Trump has been dominating headlines, spouting nonsense and picking fights on Twitter like a schoolyard bully.

Here in Florida, we've got our own Trump: Patrick's primary opponent, Alan Grayson.

Rachel Maddow of _MSNBC_ recently said Grayson **" has a Donald Trump-esque sense of self."** I think that's putting it mildly.

Florida families don't need a showhorse like Grayson in the U.S. Senate. They need a workhorse who can reach across the aisle and deliver results. Patrick's the only one in this race who can do that.

This is an important month for Patrick and our campaign -- _the end of another FEC fundraising quarter_. The numbers we post will be picked apart by the press and our opponents. And with less than a year before the primary, every dollar matters.

_**After looking through what we have in the bank and what expenses we have coming up, we 've set a goal of $50,000 before the FEC deadline on September 30th.**_

[**Help us kick-start the month with a contribution of $5 or $10 right now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20fe/738133e4/3ac61823/7f89e088/2807779451/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150904?refcode=pme150904_m&recurring=true")

Thanks for all of your support.

Josh Josh Wolf
Campaign Manager
Friends of Patrick Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20fe/738133e4/3ac61823/7f89e089/2807779451/VEsE/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: We’re officially launching Women for Hillary -- will you join?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
We're launching Women for Hillary. | Friend --

The fight for women and families is personal for me -- and I know that’s true for women all over America.

When Marco Rubio says equal pay legislation is “wasting time,” that’s personal for the factory worker fighting to paid the same wage as her male co-workers. When Jeb Bush says Planned Parenthood shouldn’t get a penny, that’s personal for the nurse who risks her safety to help other women get the health care they need.

We know what’s at stake for women in this election -- and we also know that women’s votes will decide the winner. Will you fight with me to make sure our next president is a champion for women?

**[Today, we’re officially launching Women for Hillary, and we need you to be a part of it. Will you join us?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM0MzQxNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwNDM3NjAyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We know how much we can accomplish when we stand together. We can build a brighter future for women and families. We can even shatter the highest, hardest glass ceiling in America.

**I need you with me. Sign up to be one of the very first members of Women for Hillary:

[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/women-for-hillary/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM0MzQxNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwNDM3NjAyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Hillary

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM0MzQxNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwNDM3NjAyS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM0MzQxNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwNDM3NjAyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM0MzQxNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwNDM3NjAyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM0MzQxNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwNDM3NjAyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM0MzQxNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwNDM3NjAyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM0MzQxNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwNDM3NjAyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM0MzQxNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQwNDM3NjAyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
